arts.ttl: Napoli Taking Steps to Beat Chelsea to Man Utd Outcast
arts.sum: Napoli and Manchester United re-established contact for Argentine forward Alejandro Garnacho on Friday. According to Gianluca Di Marzio, the Serie A pacesetters renewed talks with the Red Devils yesterday as they bid to complete a mouth-watering double swoop this winter. arts.ttl: Napoli’s Olivera Sidelined with Injury, Set to Miss Juventus Clash
arts.sum: Napoli has been hit with unfortunate news as Mathias Olivera suffered a muscle injury during training at Castel Volturno. The left-back experienced discomfort yesterday and will not be available for the upcoming high-profile match against Juventus.
